dossier.text: Institutions are Risk On on the tape (risk-now +28.0: managers near full exposure, dark-pool bid 57.7%) while positioning defensively forward (-36.5: tail hedges bid, buyback blackout deepening). The rotation is out of S&P 500 Broad and broad beta into Semiconductors. In cash treasuries the ledger shows futures specs net long +419,448 contracts against a dealer settled book of $-9.9B.
